We just click on view and it creates all the slides for us all you have to do, or somebody on your team or you can go over to to Fiverr and hire somebody to make sorry, I was like, where would I go? You can go over to Fiverr and somebody will create those graphics for you. But not only is it going to create your entire slide deck, it's also going to create your outline. So you're going to be able to have your outline so that you can use it as speaker notes while you're presenting, you can either present this live or you can present this as an evergreen webinar, you can do this from the stage, you can do this over go to webinar over zoom, whatever software you're using. What am I going to put up on my funnel to get people to sign up? Boom, here is your sales copy written for you.
